reviews.comment:
Excelente jamón crudo, pero tuve problemas con la nafta que me cargaron. Después de cargar el auto empezó a fallar, agua o basura en el carburador.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent cured ham, but I had problems with the gasoline they gave me. After filling up, the car started to misfire; there was water or debris in the carburetor.
